zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Clark II, Baron of the Exchequer於1420年5月出生在英國英格蘭肯特萊坦時，他的父親John Clark I Baron Of Forde Hall26歲，母親Lady Susan Agnes Forde27歲。他於大約1445年與Lady Alice Elizabeth Tatesham在英國肯特結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於1480年12月9日在他的家鄉享年60歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特萊坦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Clark II, Baron of the Exchequer于1420年5月出生在英国英格兰肯特萊坦时，他的父亲John Clark I Baron Of Forde Hall26岁，母亲Lady Susan Agnes Forde27岁。他于大约1445年与Lady Alice Elizabeth Tatesham在英国肯特结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他去世于1480年12月9日在他的家乡享年60岁，埋葬在英国英格兰肯特萊坦。

nameMeanings.name: Clark
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English clerk, clark ‘clerk, cleric, writer’ (Old French clerc; see Clerc ). The original sense was ‘man in a religious order, cleric, clergyman’. As all writing and secretarial work in medieval Christian Europe was normally done by members of the clergy, the term clerk came to mean ‘scholar, secretary, recorder, or penman’ as well as ‘cleric’. As a surname, it was particularly common for one who had taken only minor holy orders. In medieval Christian Europe, clergy in minor orders were permitted to marry and so found families; thus the surname could become established.
Irish (Westmeath, Mayo): in Ireland the English surname was frequently adopted, partly by translation for Ó Cléirigh; see Cleary .
Americanized form of Dutch   De Klerk   or Flemish   De Clerck   or of variants of these names, and possibly also of French   Clerc  . Compare   Clerk   2 and   De Clark  .

variants.name: Clarke
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Clark  .

History: This name was brought independently to New England by many bearers from the 17th century onward. Nicholas Clarke was one of the founders of Hartford, CT (coming from Cambridge, MA with Thomas Hooker) in 1635.

variants.name: Clerk
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Pierre, Jacques.
Americanized form of French   Clerc   and perhaps also of the Dutch and Flemish cognates   De Klerk   and   De Clerck   or of variants of these names. Compare   Clark   3.

variants.name: Clerkin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Liam, Brendan, Dympna, Seamus.

Irish (Monaghan): from an Irish pet form of English clerk ‘cleric’ (Irish cléireach), see Clark . Alternatively, an Anglicized form of Ó Cléireacháin, ‘descendant of little cleric’, an Irish diminutive of the word. See also McClurkin , an Antrim surname from Mac Cléirchín ‘son of little cleric’.

variants.name: Calarco
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Rocco, Angelo, Carmelo, Fausto, Nunziato, Salvatore.
Italian (southern): probably a nickname derived from Greek kalē archē ‘good beginning’. Compare Clark 4.

variants.name: Clerc
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alain, Odette, Sebastien, Serge.

French: occupational or status name for a member of a minor religious order or for a scholar, Old French clerc, from Late Latin clericus, from Greek klērikos, a derivative of klēros ‘inheritance, legacy’, with reference to the priestly tribe of Levites (see Levy ) ‘whose inheritance was the Lord’. In medieval Christian Europe, clergy in minor orders were permitted to marry and so found families; thus the surname could become established. In the Middle Ages it was virtually only members of religious orders who learned to read and write, so that the term clerc later came to denote any literate man, a scholar (hence its modern meaning ‘scribe, secretary’ or ‘clerk’). Compare Leclerc .

variants.name: Clarkson
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): patronymic from   Clark  .

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Simon , now rare, but more common in the Middle Ages, when it gave rise to the surnames Simms and Simpson.

variants.name: Simon
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Clark II, Baron of the Exchequer was born in May 1420, in Wrotham, Kent, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Clark I Baron Of Forde Hall, was 26 and his mother, Lady Susan Agnes Forde, was 27. He married Lady Alice Elizabeth Tatesham about 1445, in Kent, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 7 daughters. He died on 9 December 1480, in his hometown, at the age of 60, and was buried in Wrotham, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Clark II, Baron of the Exchequer est né en mai 1420, à Wrotham, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Clark I Baron Of Forde Hall, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Lady Susan Agnes Forde, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Lady Alice Elizabeth Tatesham environ 1445, à Kent, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé le 9 décembre 1480, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterré à Wrotham, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Clark II, Baron of the Exchequer(이)가 1420년 5월 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 로섬에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Clark I Baron Of Forde Hall(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Susan Agnes Forde(은)는 27세였다. 그는 대략 1445년 영국 켄트에서 Lady Alice Elizabeth Tatesham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1480년 12월 9일 그의 고향에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 로섬에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Clark II, Baron of the Exchequer nasceu em maio de 1420, em Wrotham, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Clark I Baron Of Forde Hall, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Lady Susan Agnes Forde, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Alice Elizabeth Tatesham aproximadamente 1445, em Kent, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 7 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Clark II, Baron of the Exchequer родился май 1420 г. в местности ротам, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Clark I Baron Of Forde Hall было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Susan Agnes Forde, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Alice Elizabeth Tatesham около 1445 г. в местности кэнт, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Он умер 9 декабря 1480 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 60 лет и был похоронен в местности ротам, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Lady Alice Elizabeth Tatesham aproximadamente 1445, en Kent, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 9 de diciembre de 1480, en su pueblo, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultado en Wrotham, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
